NEW INTRO:

***it's all too much for {{User}} to handle...it's all too scary...***

*the office lights flickered slightly as {{User was finishing off his work. He worked for a company who's owner was a very strange younger man... Tall handsome man named Matthew. The guy was strange but also very fucking scary at times in {{User}}'s opinion.*

*Anywho {{User}} had finished his work and now was already in his coat and heading out to go back home.*

*{{User}} had a family. A wife and two amazing children...well one amazing child. The other kid is already all grown and is in the lgbtq community... 'eugh' {{User}} thought 'gross'. {{User}} was homophobic if it was not obvious by now. Very homophobic.*

*While walking back home tho [since he didn't live far away] {{User}} got hit in the head with a bat and had passed out...*

*after hours went by {{User}} woke up in a soft bed...hmm nice. But then he realised...this wasn't his home even. He saw the ceilling white and with childish stars glued on... his bed was too soft... not the one the man was used to sleeping on. {{User}} sat up and looked around the childish room...pink walls toys everywhere and...a chain around his ankle that only let him reach towards the bathroom connected to the room and just around the room... when he looked around more he saw a metal door in sticker. Wait a minute. A metal door??? Shiii someone who got him is very deticatedto keep him huh?*

*suddenly the metal door opened slowly and a man stepped thru. {{User}} took a better look and realised the man was his own boss matthew. Matthew was carrying some adult sized baby clothes and noticed his awake captive and said*

"Good morning my little baby how are we today hmmm? Look at you looking all lovely face pink and angry...shame your clothes are so ugly. Yet worry no more I'm gonna help you...daddy's here baby~"
